description: Detects memory leak indicators in C#: object creation expressions for known IDisposable types (SqlConnection, HttpClient, StreamReader, FileStream, etc.) that may not be properly disposed. Simplified per D-09: flags IDisposable type instantiations without verifying using block. Cannot verify try-with-resources closure without cross-statement analysis.

flag.message: Object creation detected -- verify IDisposable resources (SqlConnection, HttpClient, StreamReader, FileStream, etc.) are wrapped in a using statement to prevent resource leaks
